name: io.github.viralnote/mcp-server
title: ViralNote
description: Schedule, publish, and analyze social posts on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, Threads, LinkedIn.

environmentVariables.name: VIRALNOTE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ViralNote API key (create one at https://dashboard.viralnote.app/developers/auth). Format: vnd_...

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer API key from https://dashboard.viralnote.app/developers/auth. Format: Bearer vnd_...
